history.en: Developed in the 17th-18th century in the Brittany province of France as a versatile hunting dog capable of pointing and retrieving on various terrain. Refined through crosses with English Setters and recognized by AKC in 1934.
history.zh: 17-18世纪在法国布列塔尼省培育的多功能猎犬，能在各种地形指示和寻回猎物。通过英国雪达犬杂交改良，1934年获AKC认可。

overview.en: The Brittany is a medium-sized, athletic sporting dog known for its boundless energy, intelligence, and eagerness to please. Bred as a versatile hunting companion in France, this breed excels in pointing and retrieving. Brittanies are exceptionally friendly, forming strong bonds with their families and getting along well with children and other dogs. Their happy, enthusiastic demeanor makes them wonderful family pets, but they require ample exercise and mental stimulation to prevent boredom. With a lifespan of 12–14 years, they are generally healthy but prone to hip dysplasia and eye conditions. Their coat is dense and flat or wavy, typically orange and white or liver and white, requiring regular grooming.
overview.zh: 布列塔尼犬是一种中型、运动型的猎犬，以其无穷的精力、聪明才智和乐于取悦主人而闻名。作为法国培育的多用途狩猎伴侣，该品种擅长指示和寻回。布列塔尼犬异常友善，与家人建立牢固的情感纽带，并能与儿童和其他犬只友好相处。它们快乐、热情的性格使其成为优秀的家庭宠物，但需要充足的运动和智力刺激以避免无聊。它们的寿命为12-14年，总体健康，但易患髋关节发育不良和眼部疾病。被毛浓密、平坦或波浪状，通常为橙色和白色或肝色和白色，需要定期梳理。

care.en: Daily care for a Brittany includes at least 60–90 minutes of vigorous exercise such as running, hiking, or playing fetch. They thrive in active households and need a securely fenced yard. Grooming is moderate: brush their coat weekly, bathe as needed, and trim nails monthly. Clean ears regularly to prevent infections, and brush teeth frequently. Annual vet visits are essential for vaccinations, heartworm prevention, and health screenings. Brittanies are prone to hip dysplasia, epilepsy, and allergies, so regular check-ups help catch issues early. Provide mental stimulation through puzzle toys, training sessions, or field work to keep them engaged.
care.zh: 布列塔尼犬的日常护理包括每天至少60-90分钟的剧烈运动，如跑步、徒步或接球游戏。它们适合活跃的家庭，需要有安全围栏的院子。美容要求适中：每周梳理被毛，按需洗澡，每月修剪指甲。定期清洁耳朵以防感染，并经常刷牙。每年兽医检查至关重要，包括疫苗接种、心丝虫预防和健康筛查。布列塔尼犬易患髋关节发育不良、癫痫和过敏，因此定期体检有助于及早发现问题。通过益智玩具、训练课程或野外工作提供智力刺激，以保持它们的参与度。

training.en: Brittanies are highly intelligent and eager to please, making training a rewarding experience. Use positive reinforcement methods like treats, praise, and play. Start socialization and basic obedience early, as they can be sensitive to harsh corrections. Consistency and patience are key; keep sessions short and fun to maintain their focus. They excel in dog sports like agility, rally, and field trials. Their strong prey drive may require recall training with a long line initially. Avoid repetitive drills—vary activities to prevent boredom. Brittanies are natural retrievers, so incorporate fetching into training. Early exposure to different environments and sounds helps build a well-rounded adult dog.
training.zh: 布列塔尼犬非常聪明且乐于取悦主人，因此训练是一种有益的体验。使用积极强化方法，如零食、表扬和游戏。尽早开始社交和基础服从训练，因为它们可能对严厉的纠正敏感。一致性和耐心是关键；保持训练时间短而有趣，以维持它们的注意力。它们在敏捷、拉力赛和野外测试等犬类运动中表现出色。强烈的猎物冲动可能需要先用长绳进行召回训练。避免重复的练习——变化活动以防止无聊。布列塔尼犬是天生的寻回犬，因此将接球游戏融入训练中。早期接触不同环境和声音有助于培养全面发展的成年犬。

diet.en: Feed a high-quality dog food appropriate for their life stage (puppy, adult, senior) and activity level. Brittanies are active, so a diet with moderate protein and fat supports their energy needs. Divide meals into two portions daily to prevent bloat—a risk in deep-chested breeds. Avoid overfeeding; maintain a lean body condition to reduce joint stress. Treats should be limited and healthy, such as small pieces of fruits or vegetables. Ensure fresh water is always available. Consult your vet for specific dietary recommendations, especially if your dog has food allergies or sensitivities. Omega-3 fatty acids from fish oil can benefit coat and joint health.
diet.zh: 喂食适合其生命阶段（幼犬、成犬、老年犬）和活动水平的高质量狗粮。布列塔尼犬活跃，因此含适量蛋白质和脂肪的饮食可满足其能量需求。将每日食物分成两餐，以防胃胀气——这是深胸品种的风险。避免过度喂食；保持瘦削的体态以减少关节压力。限制零食并选择健康的，如小块水果或蔬菜。确保随时有新鲜饮用水。咨询兽医以获得具体的饮食建议，特别是如果您的狗有食物过敏或敏感。鱼油中的Omega-3脂肪酸有益于被毛和关节健康。

livingTips.en: Brittanies are best suited for homes with a securely fenced yard where they can run freely. They can adapt to apartment living only if provided with ample daily exercise and mental stimulation. They are excellent with children, especially when raised together, but may be too energetic for very young toddlers. They generally get along well with other dogs and can coexist with cats if socialized early. Due to their hunting instincts, they may chase small animals outdoors. Brittanies are not guard dogs; they are friendly with strangers. They thrive on human companionship and should not be left alone for long periods, as they may develop separation anxiety. Provide plenty of interactive toys and consider doggy daycare if you work long hours.
livingTips.zh: 布列塔尼犬最适合拥有安全围栏院子的家庭，以便它们自由奔跑。如果提供充足的日常运动和智力刺激，它们也能适应公寓生活。它们与儿童相处融洽，尤其是从小一起长大的情况下，但可能对于非常年幼的幼儿来说过于精力旺盛。它们通常与其他犬只友好相处，如果早期社交，也能与猫共存。由于狩猎本能，它们可能会在户外追逐小动物。布列塔尼犬不是护卫犬；它们对陌生人友善。它们依赖人类陪伴，不应长时间独处，否则可能产生分离焦虑。提供大量互动玩具，如果工作时间长，可考虑狗狗日托。
